name: Columbia State Community College
description: Come play pickleball at Columbia State Community College in Columbia, TN! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Fairview Recreation Park
description: Come play pickleball at Fairview Recreation Park in Columbia, TN! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Hustle Factory
description: Hustle Factory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Spring Hill, TN. There are 3 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, lights, and water. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.

name: Longview Recreation Center At Spring Hill
description: Longview Recreation Center At Spring Hill is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Spring Hill, TN. There are 12 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Macedonia Recreation Center
description: Macedonia Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Columbia, TN. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.
